series_metadata.series_description: Merged credit union files contain the Articles of Incorporation and Code of Regulations of merged credit unions, all correspondence, financial information, and statutory examinations for a particular credit union.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy. ; Microform: Retain microfilm in operating area as well as off-site storage facility for five (5) years after date of merger, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files for five (5) years after date of merger, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
